items.title: Y Combinator settles first all-stablecoin funding in USDC on Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: Y Combinator's all-stablecoin funding in USDC on Solana signals growing institutional interest, potentially enhancing liquidity and usage within the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Solana: 25.3 billion transactions later, is SOL still undervalued?
items.whyYouShouldCare: With 25.3 billion transactions recorded, the question of SOL's valuation highlights the network's robust activity and its implications for future price dynamics.

items.title: Jito [JTO] jumps 17% as whales step in – Breakout next?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Jito's 17% price jump indicates increased whale activity, which could lead to further momentum and interest in Solana-based applications.
